tasks.title: Harden restore archive path traversal checks
evidence: path: internal/cli/manage/restore.go :: containsPathTraversal :: uses os.PathSeparator to split; tar headers use '/' so '../' can bypass on Windows
path: internal/cli/manage/restore.go :: validateBackup :: relies on containsPathTraversal as the only traversal gate
plan: Update traversal detection to use a platform-agnostic check (e.g., path.Clean on '/'-separated tar names) and reject absolute or .. paths
Re-validate or sanitize header.Name during extraction so restoreFromArchive cannot bypass validation
Add tests for '../', '..\', and absolute path entries to ensure validation fails
Verify by running `go test ./internal/cli/manage -run Restore` and confirming traversal cases are rejected

tasks.title: Fix GraphQL createJob to set ResultPath and validate inputs
evidence: path: internal/api/graphql/resolver_jobs.go :: ResolveCreateJob :: constructs model.Job without ResultPath and calls Store.Create directly
path: internal/jobs/job_run.go :: run :: expects job.ResultPath to create result directory and file
plan: Route GraphQL createJob through Manager.CreateJob or set ResultPath using the same DATA_DIR/jobs/{id} convention
Validate and map GraphQL input params/dependsOn into JobSpec to keep behavior consistent with REST/CLI
Add tests for createJob ensuring ResultPath is set and job can be enqueued
Verify by running `go test ./internal/api/graphql -run CreateJob` and confirming jobs persist with non-empty ResultPath

tasks.title: Preserve request body bytes across job persistence/recovery
evidence: path: internal/jobs/job_create.go :: CreateScrapeJob :: stores request body as []byte in Params
path: internal/store/store_jobs.go :: Create :: marshals job.Params to JSON ([]byte becomes base64 string)
path: internal/jobs/helpers.go :: decodeBytes :: treats string as raw bytes, does not base64-decode
path: internal/jobs/manager.go :: recoverQueuedJobs :: reloads params from store before enqueue
plan: Introduce an explicit body encoding scheme (e.g., store body as string with base64 marker) to round-trip through JSON
Update decodeBytes (and any encoder) to detect and decode the stored representation reliably
Add recovery tests to ensure queued jobs retain exact request bodies after store round-trip
Verify by running `go test ./internal/jobs -run Recovery` and confirming body equality on recovered jobs

tasks.title: Require --force when restore target data dir is non-empty
evidence: path: internal/cli/manage/restore.go :: RunRestore :: --force described as 'data directory is not empty' but only checks isDataDirInUse
path: internal/cli/manage/restore.go :: isDataDirInUse :: checks lock file / exclusive create only, no directory emptiness check
plan: Add a data directory emptiness check before restore and block unless --force is set
Align --force help text and restore messaging with the actual behavior
Add tests for restoring into non-empty directories with/without --force
Verify by running `go test ./internal/cli/manage -run Restore` and confirming non-empty dirs are rejected without --force

tasks.title: Add batch job submission workflow (CLI + Web UI)
evidence: path: api/openapi.yaml :: /v1/jobs/batch/scrape :: batch endpoints exist for scrape/crawl/research
path: internal/cli/help.go :: Commands list :: no batch command exposed
path: web/src/App.tsx :: imports ScrapeForm/CrawlForm/ResearchForm only (no batch submission UI)
plan: Add a CLI batch subcommand that accepts CSV/JSON input and maps rows to batch scrape/crawl/research requests
Add a Web UI bulk submit panel with file upload/paste, validation feedback, and batch status/cancel controls
Add CLI and Web UI tests covering request construction, validation errors, and batch status rendering
Verify by running `go test ./internal/cli/... -run Batch` and `cd web && pnpm run test` and confirming batch jobs are created and listed

tasks.title: Expose watch monitoring via API + Web UI
evidence: path: internal/cli/help.go :: Commands list :: watch add/list/check/start exists
path: internal/watch/watch.go :: Watcher handles change detection and webhook dispatch
path: api/openapi.yaml :: paths section :: no /v1/watch endpoints present
plan: Define watch CRUD/check endpoints in OpenAPI and route them in the API server
Implement handlers that persist watches, trigger checks, and return diffs using internal/watch storage
Add a Web UI panel to create/list/disable watches and view last change/diff details
Add API and UI tests for watch creation, listing, and check responses
Verify by running `go test ./internal/api -run Watch` and `cd web && pnpm run test` and confirming watch lifecycle works end-to-end

tasks.title: Expose network interception config and traffic replay controls in UI/CLI
evidence: path: api/openapi.yaml :: ScrapeRequest/CrawlRequest/ResearchRequest :: networkIntercept config supported
path: internal/cli/common/flags.go :: common flags include proxy/captcha but no network interception flags
path: web/src/components/TrafficInspector.tsx :: empty-state notes traffic capture requires interception enabled
plan: Add CLI flags for network interception (enable, URL patterns, resource types, max entries) and wire into job specs
Add Web UI controls in scrape/crawl/research forms to enable and configure interception, saving in presets
Add a replay action in the Traffic Inspector to call /v1/jobs/{id}/replay with a user-supplied target base URL
Add CLI parsing tests and Web UI tests for interception config and replay action wiring
Verify by running `go test ./internal/cli/scrape -run Intercept` and `cd web && pnpm run test` and confirming intercepted traffic is captured and replay can be triggered

tasks.title: Add chain management CLI + Web UI (create/list/submit)
evidence: path: api/openapi.yaml :: /v1/chains :: chain CRUD and submit endpoints exist
path: internal/cli/help.go :: Commands list :: no chain command exposed
path: web/src/components/JobList.tsx :: chain badge shown for jobs, but no chain creation UI
plan: Add CLI chain subcommands for list/get/create/submit/delete to wrap /v1/chains endpoints
Add a Web UI chain builder/editor with validation and a submit action to instantiate chains
Add CLI and Web UI tests for chain CRUD and submit flows
Verify by running `go test ./internal/cli/manage -run Chain` and `cd web && pnpm run test` and confirming chain jobs submit successfully
